calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-24-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-07-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Frank J. Drago, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Kimberly A. Bliss, Esq. appeared for plaintiff City and County of San Francisco, a municipal corporation.
Donna Levitt, Manager of the Office of Labor Standards for the City and County of San Francisco, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Bing Hong Ng or Golden Dragon Restaurant.
Defaults entered against defendants on August 19, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, October 7, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff City and County of San Francisco, a municipal corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendants Golden Dragon Restaurant and Big Hong Ng as follows:

Damages/Principal - $943,482.42.
Prejudgment Interest - $142,060.24.
Attorney's Fees - $5,788.75.
Costs - $1,805.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $1,093,136.41.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-03-2008 Continued To Nov-07-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
